nodes.name: Trigger: Manual
nodes.notes: Runs after ideas-to-sheet. Reviews all TOPIC_READY ideas in batch. IMPORTANT: After implementing this gate, update topic-to-script--generational-slang and podcast-topic-to-script--three-gens-talks to filter status = 'REVIEW_APPROVED' instead of 'TOPIC_READY'.

nodes.name: Code: Build Config
nodes.notes: Builds flat Name→Value map from EnvironmentVariables rows. Validates Anthropic_ApiKey, prompt_canon_header, and prompt_ideas_review. Canon keys (canon_audience, canon_tone, canon_no_go_topics, canon_bias_rules, canon_uniqueness_rules) are included automatically if written by canon-to-config.

nodes.name: Code: Filter TOPIC_READY
nodes.notes: Filters all Ideas rows to TOPIC_READY status. Throws if none found.

nodes.name: Code: Build Review Prompts
nodes.notes: Builds one Anthropic API payload per TOPIC_READY idea. system = prompt_canon_header from config. user = prompt_ideas_review from config with placeholder substitution. No hardcoded prompt prose.

nodes.name: Code: Parse Review Results
nodes.notes: Parses each Anthropic response. Matches by item index to retrieve original idea_id from Code: Build Review Prompts. Falls back to NEEDS_REWORK on parse error.

nodes.name: n8n Table: Update Idea Review Status
Code: Review Summary
nodes.notes: Aggregates review results across all ideas in the batch.

main.node: n8n Table: Update Idea Review Status
